security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: tauri:; media-src 'self' data: blob: tauri:; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://cdn.jsdelivr.net data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.longDescription: A browser-based 2D skeletal animation editor (Spine 4.x compatible), packaged as a native desktop app via Tauri.
